strengths: Recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and frameworks for agentic workflows.
Strong background in high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems and microservices.
Direct experience in the fintech industry at a German capital investment firm.
concerns: Lacks any formal engineering leadership or team management experience; all roles are individual contributor (IC).
No demonstrated experience scaling an engineering organization, a hard requirement for the role.
Experience in regulated environments or with compliance/auditability infrastructure is not mentioned.

key_factors.factor: Lack of Team Scaling Track Record

response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior technologist with relevant hands-on experience in AI-agent infrastructure, distributed systems, and the fintech domain. His technical skills align well with the architectural demands of the role. However, the resume shows a critical gap in leadership experience. There is no evidence of managing engineering teams, scaling an organization, developing senior talent, or operating at an executive level, all of which are core requirements for this CTO position at a venture-backed scale-up.
